ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes, Metacritic) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the rating */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews from the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award/nomination */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that received the award/nomination */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "is_nomination" INTEGER /* Indicates whether it is a nomination (true) or a win (false) */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trailers" (
  "trailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trailer */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that the trailer belongs to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the trailer is hosted (e.g., YouTube) */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the trailer */,
  "viewcount" INTEGER /* Viewcount of the trailer */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the trailer was uploaded */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trailer in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trailer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "budget_type" TEXT /* Type of budget (e.g., production, adjusted production) */,
  "budget_value" INTEGER /* Value of the budget */,
  "revenue_type" TEXT /* Type of revenue (e.g., box office, streaming) */,
  "revenue_value" INTEGER /* Value of the revenue */,
  "revenue_date" TEXT /* Date when the revenue was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the box office revenue was generated (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Box office revenue */,
  "inflation_adjusted_revenue" INTEGER /* Inflation-adjusted box office revenue */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released in the region */,
  "theater_count" INTEGER /* Number of theaters the movie was shown in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, studio executive, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
